description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in what appears to be a stylized, historical or fantasy-inspired outfit. He wears a sleeveless armored vest with a metallic sheen over a fitted shirt, and a wide sash or belt tied at the waist, with the ends hanging down. His pants are tucked into tall boots, and his arms are bare, showing a muscular build. The figure has a full beard and mustache, and his hair is styled in a topknot. The overall appearance suggests a warrior or guard, suitable for urban or street settings in a themed or narrative context.
description: A bearded male adult in a sleeveless armored vest, sash, fitted pants, and tall boots, styled as a fantasy or historical warrior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored vest, sash, muscular arms, and facial features including beard and topknot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the topknot, arm, and the layered look of the vest and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the armored vest, the tied sash, and the back of the boots and topknot.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile and the drape of the sash.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless armored vest, fitted shirt, wide sash, tucked pants, tall boots
